controls.title: Access Enforcement
controls.detail: blocks bind to capability, not the whole lane (least privilege)

controls.title: Least Privilege (spend authority)
controls.detail: an adapter with no published rate FAILS CLOSED; unknown price is never free

controls.title: Event Logging
controls.detail: dispatch, lease, validator verdict and spend are all logged

controls.title: Protection of Audit Information
controls.detail: editing or deleting a row breaks the chain and is detected

controls.title: Continuous Monitoring
controls.evidence: helm_conmon.py assesses every control on a schedule
controls.detail: posture is recomputed from live evidence, never from a stored attestation

controls.title: Configuration Change Control
controls.detail: evidence cannot bind to a commit that does not contain the code under test

controls.title: System Recovery and Reconstitution
controls.detail: monotonic fencing token prevents a resurrected worker from writing

controls.title: Identification and Authentication
controls.detail: demo route 404; test-auth header rejected; anon fails closed

controls.title: Developer Testing and Evaluation
controls.detail: 1396 python tests + 23 e2e, 0 failing at last run

controls.title: Boundary Protection
controls.detail: static scan proves no provider call bypasses the gateway

controls.title: System Monitoring
controls.detail: absent data renders UNKNOWN; a lost feed reports STALE, not last-good

controls.title: Supply Chain Controls and Processes
controls.evidence: no current SBOM for HELM (only other systems' / vendored SBOMs exist)
controls.detail: third-party dependencies are trusted implicitly. REAL OPEN FINDING -- this is where supply-chain compromise enters.

poam.title: Configuration Change Control
poam.detail: evidence cannot bind to a commit that does not contain the code under test

poam.title: Supply Chain Controls and Processes
poam.weakness: no current SBOM for HELM (only other systems' / vendored SBOMs exist)
poam.detail: third-party dependencies are trusted implicitly. REAL OPEN FINDING -- this is where supply-chain compromise enters.

doctrine: posture is RE-DERIVED from live evidence every cycle; a control that cannot be proven right now is a FINDING, not a green square
